title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with Oguri Cap...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's staring at a claw machine full of
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They just remind me of the plushies Masa used to
give me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I won a race, Masa would bring me a
plushie to motivate me to keep up the good
work.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They were weirdly shaped, homemade plushies,
but they really made me happy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
A-are you sure? I guess I do kinda want one, but...
why?
choice_data_list: I want to keep you motivated!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Thanks. It makes me happy to hear you say
that. In that case, I'll be cheering for you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail.
